pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8, export_result.sh line 6, all hook scripts reference this path
setup_task.sh lines 9-10 create directory structure and line 38 creates PaymentProcessor.java in package com.example.payments

export_result.sh line 24 searches for TransactionRequest.java, verifier.py line 55 checks for TransactionRequest class, task.json description explicitly states 'Create a new class named TransactionRequest'

setup_task.sh line 43 original PaymentProcessor.processTransaction method has exact signature: public void processTransaction(String merchantId, double amount, String currency, String cardNum, String cvv, String expiry, String note). App.java line 61 and PaymentServiceTest.java line 79 both call this method with all 7 arguments matching these field names. verifier.py line 29 confirms default expected_fields

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic refactoring exercise for a legacy payment processing system. The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/legacy-payment-module. The target class PaymentProcessor.java is in src/main/java/com/example/payments/ with a processTransaction method that currently takes 7 parameters: merchantId (String), amount (double), currency (String), cardNum (String), cvv (String), expiry (String), and note (String). The refactoring task requires creating a new TransactionRequest class to encapsulate these 7 fields and updating all callers (App.java and PaymentServiceTest.java) to use the new parameter object pattern.
